SEARCH

所有程序包的分层结构

程序包分层结构:
  • system,
  • system.admin,
  • system.mo,
  • system.ta,
  • system.ui

类分层结构

  • java.lang.Object
    • system.Application (implements java.io.Serializable)
    • java.awt.Component (implements java.awt.image.ImageObserver, java.awt.MenuContainer, java.io.Serializable)
      • java.awt.Container
        • java.awt.Window (implements javax.accessibility.Accessible)
          • java.awt.Frame (implements java.awt.MenuContainer)
            • javax.swing.JFrame (implements javax.accessibility.Accessible, javax.swing.RootPaneContainer, javax.swing.WindowConstants)
              • system.admin.AdminManageWorkloadFrame
              • system.admin.AdminViewAllJobsFrame
              • system.admin.AdminViewAllTAsFrame
              • system.admin.AdminViewLogsFrame
              • system.admin.AdminViewWorkloadFrame
              • system.DashboardFrame
              • system.LoginFrame
              • system.mo.MOEditJobFrame
              • system.mo.MOMyJobsFrame
              • system.mo.MOPostJobFrame
              • system.mo.MOViewApplicantsFrame
              • system.NotificationFrame
              • system.RegisterFrame
              • system.ta.TAApplicationStatusFrame
              • system.ta.TACVUploadFrame
              • system.ta.TAJobListFrame
              • system.ta.TAProfileCreateFrame
              • system.ta.TAProfileEditFrame
              • system.ta.TAProfileViewFrame
    • system.FileUtil
    • java.awt.FlowLayout (implements java.awt.LayoutManager, java.io.Serializable)
      • system.ui.WrapLayout
    • system.Job (implements java.io.Serializable)
    • system.LoggerUtil
    • system.Notification (implements java.io.Serializable)
    • system.Profile (implements java.io.Serializable)
    • system.UIHelper
    • system.User (implements java.io.Serializable)
